productive_bridges: V-ATPase pH microdomains as condensate nucleation templates
VGCC activation threshold as binary condensate gate via CaMKII-FUS phosphorylation
Circadian V-ATPase oscillation as condensate renewal mechanism
Wound injury current as condensate dissolution trigger

killed_hypotheses.title: Electric Field-Directed Condensate Positioning Explains Left-Right Asymmetry Breaking
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Electrophoretic force from physiological electric fields (~10^-17 N) is ~1000x too weak to overcome thermal noise (~10^-14 N). Established cilia-based mechanism explains laterality.

killed_hypotheses.title: Morphogenetic Memory Is Physically Stored in Self-Sustaining Condensate-Voltage Circuits
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Dropped (not killed): Condensate lifetime (minutes-hours) incompatible with memory duration (weeks-months). 1,6-hexanediol test fatally confounded by kinase/phosphatase inhibition.

killed_hypotheses.title: Gap Junction-Mediated Ion Sharing Creates Tissue-Scale Condensate Coherence Domains
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Dropped: Quantitative argument too weak. Gap junction ion transfer magnitude likely insufficient to shift condensate formation thresholds in receiving cells.

surviving_hypotheses: V-ATPase pH-Condensate Nodes as the Molecular Effector Layer of the Bioelectric Code
Calcium-Gated Condensate Dissolution as the Binary Transduction Step in Bioelectric Pattern Reading
Circadian V-ATPase Rhythms and Tissue-Specific Condensate Phase Diagrams Determine Chronovulnerability to Neurodegeneration
Wound-Edge V-ATPase Activation Triggers Condensate Dissolution Wave as a Rapid Regenerative Signal

Levin 2023 - bioelectric code as computational medium
2025 Nat Chem - condensates sustain pH gradients without energy
Brown & Nagel 2025 - circadian clock and stress-induced condensates
Burrinha 2023 - V-ATPase decline in aged neurons
lessons_learned: Disjoint field pairs produce highest novelty; the bioelectric x condensate pair had no cross-citations
V-ATPase emerged as the strongest bridge concept across ALL four final hypotheses
Back-of-envelope physics calculations are essential for filtering impossible hypotheses early (saved H8 from wasting pipeline time)
pH-mediated mechanisms are more tractable than direct electric field effects on condensates
The most groundable hypotheses use INDIRECT bioelectric effects (via pH, Ca2+) rather than direct electric field effects
